title: Amcor (AMCR) to Conduct Research to Use Nanotech in Packaging
text: Amcor (AMCR) inks deal with Nfinite to conduct research on the use of nanotech in sustainable packaging.

title: Amcor (AMCR) Aided by Sustainable Packaging Demand, Costs Ail
text: Innovative product launches and growing demand for sustainable packaging are expected to aid Amcor's (AMCR) growth.

title: The 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For March
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." --Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats screened as of March 8, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top ten net gains ranged 16.32%-32.64% topped by WBA & VFC.

title: Amcor: Good Returns To Investors To Be Boosted By Current Investments
text: Amcor plc is a global packaging company with operations in Europe, North America, Latin America, Africa, and Asia. The company had a strong H1 2023, which resulted in good shareholder returns.
